Game.Name: Adventures of Kid Kleets, The (USA) (En,Fr,Es)
Game.plot: While the title might suggest a sports game, this is in fact a platform game - the goal was to guide a little soccer player boy through various levels, using his soccer ball as the main tool. The player was able to perform runs, shots, bicycle kicks, headers and other sorts of soccer moves to either advance in the level or eliminate enemies.Hints:Level Passwords:Passwords: WITHOUT the trophy piecesFLMJFGTFJ Level 02KCBMQCGTFJ Level 03KNLLTKGFFD Level 04GLBMHRGTFJ Level 05Passwords: with world cup piecesDCBLRPGTFJ Go to the Italy Stage with 1 World Cup pieceMMLPTKGFPD Go to the Japan Stage with 3 World Cup piecesTPLLSMGCFB Go to the Russia Stage with 2 World Cup piecesHCLLKQHKFK Go to the USA Stage with 4 World Cup pieceshttp://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Soccer_KidCheat: Cheat CodesOn the title screen, press the following button sequence to activate the corresponding cheat.Cheat: Level PasswordsNote: These passwords are WITHOUT the trophy pieces.
